user_stories.action: initiate property onboarding with address details
user_stories.outcome: Hestami maintains persistent property context for all service coordination

acceptance_criteria.description: Property record is created in active state
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: POST /properties returns 201 and GET /properties/{id} returns the stored record within 1 second

acceptance_criteria.description: Address matches utility records for verification
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: System validates address against utility feed before activating property record

user_stories.action: attach initial key photos to property record
user_stories.outcome: Property is fully documented upon creation

acceptance_criteria.description: Image files are stored and linked
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: POST /properties/{id}/assets returns 201 when image size < 10MB

user_stories.action: create a new service request for maintenance
user_stories.outcome: Request moves to pending status in the Work Order queue

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: GET /requests/{id} returns status 'pending' within 5 seconds of submission
Request object contains non-empty image asset array

user_stories.action: generate AI vendor match suggestions for request
user_stories.outcome: Top vendors are notified with matching scores above threshold

acceptance_criteria.description: Matching score exceeds 80% for top suggestions
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Response object includes 'match_score' > 80 for at least 3 vendors
Vendor receives push notification or email within 10 minutes of request creation

user_stories.action: complete vendor onboarding with certifications
user_stories.outcome: Vendor organization is active in the marketplace

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: GET /vendors/{id} returns complete profile with 'status' = 'active'
Vendor profile contains verified insurance and license documents

user_stories.action: submit a formal estimate for a Work Order
user_stories.outcome: Quoting calculator generates a formal quote with clear terms

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: POST /estimates returns 201 with line items matching pricebook
Estimate text contains disclaimer and liability clauses

user_stories.action: perform work and log completion on field device
user_stories.outcome: Job is marked complete and invoice is generated

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Work Order status changes to 'complete' upon photo upload or GPS check-in
POST /jobs/{id}/close triggers invoice generation in < 2 seconds

user_stories.action: update field data with connectivity loss
user_stories.outcome: No data loss occurs during offline operation

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Sync completes successfully and queue is empty within 30 minutes of connectivity
GET /requests shows identical data before and after sync

user_stories.action: upload meeting documents and agendas
user_stories.outcome: Documents are accessible to Board with permissions enforced

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: GET /docs/{id} returns 200 for Board Role, 403 for Member Role
WF-8 captures the upload event in audit log

user_stories.action: log a code violation for non-compliance
user_stories.outcome: Violation is linked to property and resolution timeline tracked

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: GET /violations/{id} returns associated property UUID
Violation status 'reported' triggers notification to Owner within 5 minutes

user_stories.action: cast vote on annual budget
user_stories.outcome: Votes are recorded immutably and budget status reflected

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Audit log entry is cryptographically signed
GET /budgets/{id} shows vote tallies immediately

user_stories.action: sync government permit status via API
user_stories.outcome: Permit record matches official government record

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: GET /permits/{id} returns 'active' if external API reports 'active'

user_stories.action: download warranty documents and guides
user_stories.outcome: Digital assets are retrieved securely with access logs updated

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: GET /assets/{id}/download returns 200 within 2 seconds
GET /audit-logs returns entry for file access request

user_stories.action: export system logs for compliance review
user_stories.outcome: Logs are immutable and contain all state changes

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: POST /logs/export returns read-only archive with integrity hash
GET /logs exports return 403 for non-admin roles

user_stories.action: enforce multi-tenant isolation at database level
user_stories.outcome: Row-level security prevents data leakage between tenants

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: SQL query on tenant A cannot retrieve tenant B data

user_stories.action: calculate tax liability based on jurisdiction
user_stories.outcome: Tax compliance is met for ledger entries

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Ledger Entry includes correct tax amount based on Tax Jurisdiction config

user_stories.action: issue compliance notices for covenant violations
user_stories.outcome: Notice sequence and hearing dates are tracked

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Notification sent via ENT-NOTIFICATION within statutory deadline

user_stories.action: select monetization model configuration
user_stories.outcome: Pricing slice is applied to Service Estimate

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Configuration parameter 'pricing_model' exists and is read-only

user_stories.action: define external partner integration timeline
user_stories.outcome: Scope for Nextdoor integration is documented

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Product Roadmap document contains 'Nextdoor Integration' start date

user_stories.action: define ARC committee workflow rules
user_stories.outcome: Review and approval workflow is configured

acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Workflow definition file exists for ARC review process
